# Workstation Credential Registry
<!-- Auto-generated by CORTEX boot â€” update when new logins are added -->
<!-- PASSWORDS ARE NOT STORED HERE â€” this is a reference map only -->
<!-- Storage: Windows Credential Manager + Browser password manager -->

## How to Use
- Credentials are stored in **Windows Credential Manager** (`cmdkey /list`) or **Chrome password manager**
- For SSH: use `~/.ssh/id_ed25519` (primary) or `~/.ssh/id_rsa` (legacy, NAS)
- For API tokens: stored in **Key Vault** page at `/keys` in the Creative Liberation Engine console

---

## Infrastructure / Self-Hosted

| Service | URL / Host | Username | Auth Type | Notes |
|---------|-----------|----------|-----------|-------|
| Forgejo (Gitea) | http://127.0.0.1:3000 | `operator` | Password + OAuth token | Windows Credential Manager + `git:http://127.0.0.1:3000` |
| NAS â€” Synology DSM | http://127.0.0.1:5000 | `admin` | Password | `Domain:target=127.0.0.1` in Credential Manager |
| NAS â€” SSH | 127.0.0.1:2000 | `admin` | `~/.ssh/id_ed25519` | Key auth confirmed working |
| NAS â€” SMB | \\creative-liberation-engine | `admin` | `Domain:target=creative-liberation-engine` | Windows network share |
| Dispatch Server | http://127.0.0.1:5050 | â€” | None (local only) | Creative Liberation Engine task queue |

## Development / Cloud

| Service | URL | Username | Auth Type | Notes |
|---------|-----|----------|-----------|-------|
| GitHub | https://github.com | `operator` | PAT + 2FA WebAuthn | `GitHub - https://api.github.com/operator` in Cred Manager |
| Docker Hub | https://index.docker.io/v1/ | `operator` | Password | `index.docker.io/v1/` in Credential Manager |
| Google (Drive / Gmail) | drive.google.com | `operator@gmail.com` | OAuth | `MicrosoftAccount:user=operator@gmail.com` + DriveFS |
| dhi.io | https://dhi.io | `operator` | Password | Credential Manager |

## SSH Keys
| Key | Path | Used For |
|-----|------|----------|
| `id_ed25519` | `~/.ssh/id_ed25519` | GitHub, NAS SSH (primary) |
| `id_rsa` (pub only) | `~/.ssh/id_rsa.pub` | Legacy NAS config |

## Notes
- NAS Docker socket (`/var/run/docker.sock`) requires `root` â€” `admin` SSH user is NOT in docker group
- To run Docker on NAS as admin: use DSM â†’ Container Manager UI, or DSM Task Scheduler (runs as root)
- Forgejo runner label is `ubuntu-latest` and `ubuntu-22.04` â€” runner image: `ghcr.io/catthehacker/ubuntu:act-22.04`
- To start NAS runner: **DSM â†’ Container Manager â†’ forgejo-runner â†’ Start**
